acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_dialogue_001] Across the revised dialogue at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:225 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:257, at least two of Martha's accusatory turns must contain either a self-correction, an interruption, or a concrete reference to the bowl, hand, knee, table, food, or hauling work, and none of those turns should hinge on a detachable metaphorical line that could be quoted cleanly outside this scene.

findings.acceptance_test: Across the revised dialogue at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:225 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:257, at least two of Martha's accusatory turns must contain either a self-correction, an interruption, or a concrete reference to the bowl, hand, knee, table, food, or hauling work, and none of those turns should hinge on a detachable metaphorical line that could be quoted cleanly outside this scene.
findings.problem: Martha's late-scene breakup turns start to sound composed rather than spoken. The 'old size of you' metaphor and the clean inventory of how she has been feeding and retrieving him are emotionally accurate, but they arrive too polished and thesis-shaped for her style-bible voice, which should stay bodily, task-rooted, and teenage even at maximum hurt.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen Martha's speeches at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:225, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:257 by replacing the abstract metaphor and some of the balanced phrasing with interruption, restart, concrete kitchen/body references, and Hufflepuff-task language. Keep the breakup and the accusation, but make them sound said over pain, soup, and exhaustion rather than fully drafted in advance.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy, and preservation of productive roughness (false starts, evasions, repetitions, unfinished turns) rather than polishing speech flat.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
